probe_stdout: CONFIRMED — public Tauri / HTTP surface exposes a write path to chiral_sitename_* keys that bypasses every check inside publish_site_to_directory. The "first-claim wins" guarantee in the spec is unenforceable as currently implemented.
trigger_summary: Per-name DHT records are unsigned; any peer can call put_dht_value (directly or via the daemon's /api/headless/dht/put endpoint) on chiral_sitename_<N> to redirect resolve_site_name(N) to an attacker-chosen public_url.
